purpose: Canonical quote envelope for official, offshore, and proxy inputs consumed by the Synthetic Frontier index data layer.

canonical_fields.name: source_id
canonical_fields.description: Stable source identifier used for routing, weighting, and observability.

canonical_fields.name: source_type
canonical_fields.description: Source category used by normalization and fallback policy.

canonical_fields.name: instrument_code
canonical_fields.description: Macro volatility index instrument, for example NGN_VOL or KES_VOL.

canonical_fields.name: quote_ccy_pair
canonical_fields.description: Normalized FX pair represented as BASE/QUOTE.

canonical_fields.name: observed_at_utc
canonical_fields.description: Timestamp attached to the upstream observation.

canonical_fields.name: received_at_utc
canonical_fields.description: Timestamp when the adapter captured the payload.

canonical_fields.name: normalized_value
canonical_fields.description: Canonical value after orientation, unit, and precision normalization.

canonical_fields.name: normalization_rule
canonical_fields.description: Deterministic transformation recipe used by the adapter.

canonical_fields.name: staleness_threshold
canonical_fields.description: Maximum tolerated age in seconds before the quote is considered stale.

canonical_fields.name: fallback_priority
canonical_fields.description: Lower numbers are preferred during source selection.

canonical_fields.name: anomaly_flag
canonical_fields.description: Most severe anomaly classification assigned by the pipeline.
